description: Accounts of the Qodesh, probably. Almost entirely in Arabic script, but there  is a זל after one of the names, indicating its Jewish origin. This is a bifolium containing accounts arranged in neat columns, with each entry containing a name and a sum written in Greek/Coptic numerals. Needs further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
